overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character walking through a neon-lit urban commercial district at night. The character passes futuristic parked vehicles and walks past storefronts with bright neon signage while the camera follows smoothly from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit cyberpunk commercial street with parked sports car

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past a parked sports car, moving deeper into the commercial district

notable_agents.action: green and red pixelated sports car parked at the curb with construction barriers nearby

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading TRUST on the building facade
vertical neon open sign on the storefront
green circular neon sign with white text
orange construction barriers near the parked vehicle

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit sidewalk at night, passing a distinctive green and red sports car parked on the right. Bright neon signs illuminate the storefronts, including a large TRUST sign on the building ahead, while orange construction barriers sit near the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with outdoor seating

events.description: character stops walking and stands still, looking around the surroundings

agents.ego_description: standing still on the sidewalk, surveying the neon-lit street and checking surroundings

notable_agents.action: sleek black luxury sedan with illuminated accents parked further down the street

entered.detail: plastic tables and chairs arranged outside a storefront

segments.scene_description: The character comes to a halt on the sidewalk, standing still while observing the surroundings. The green sports car is now behind, and a black luxury sedan becomes visible parked further down the street on the left, with outdoor seating areas visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered commercial walkway with luxury vehicles

events.description: character resumes walking forward down the street toward a pedestrian ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past the black sedan and approaching a pedestrian standing in the walkway ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing in the middle of the walkway facing the character
black luxury sedan with glowing accents parked at the curb

entered.detail: wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The character resumes walking down the neon-lit street, passing the black luxury sedan on the left and approaching a standing pedestrian ahead. The camera moves past graffiti-covered walls on the right, with the neon signs now closer and more prominent as the character advances deeper into the commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit commercial district as a character advances deeper into the vibrant urban night. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk past a green and red sports car and orange construction barriers, moving toward a building marked by a large TRUST sign. As the character comes to a temporary halt, the perspective shifts to reveal a black luxury sedan parked further down the street and outdoor seating areas to the right. The scene then resumes its forward momentum, passing the black sedan and moving alongside graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the camera advances toward a standing pedestrian as the surrounding neon signage becomes more prominent and immersive.
